title: Disruptor bomb
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Disruptor bombs''' were deadly explosives used by the guard of [[Xizor's Palace]]. They created a huge, green explosion, which destroys mostly everything on contact.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' video game]]

[[Category:Bombs]]
